title: midnight-craving jammy uruguayan cocoa galette
description: Indulge in a warm, gooey, and rich Uruguayan-inspired dessert, featuring double-rise bread, cocoa powder, and a hint of sweetness.
instructions: Roll out the double-rise bread to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the cocoa powder, sugar, and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs and melted butter until well combined.
Spread the chocolate mixture evenly over the bread, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the bread over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Place the galette on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25 minutes.
After 25 minutes, rotate the galette and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is warm and gooey.
Remove the galette from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
Serve the galette warm, garnished with powdered sugar if desired.
Repeat as necessary to satisfy midnight cravings.
Note: best served immediately, but can be reheated in the microwave or oven if needed.
